---
title: "Fuentes evaluadas"
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
review_dir <- file.path("data", "analysis", "daily_source_reviews")
review_files <- if (dir.exists(review_dir)) {
  list.files(review_dir, pattern = "[.]md$", full.names = TRUE)
} else {
  character()
}

cat('<p class="section-intro">Registro diario de busqueda editorial: que se reviso, que se incorporo y que queda pendiente antes de entrar al analisis publico.</p>')

if (length(review_files) == 0) {
  cat("\n\nTodavia no hay revisiones diarias registradas.\n")
} else {
  review_files <- sort(review_files, decreasing = TRUE)
  for (path in review_files) {
    lines <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
    cat("\n\n")
    cat(paste(lines, collapse = "\n"))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```
